G1_ports_independence.reason: The thin Coord package uses explicit query/Auth Protocols, repository adapters, and an executable zero-forbidden-import ceiling.

G2_route_writer_inventory.reason: All five chartered routes are reads and Coord owns zero day-one writers.

G3_auth_project_scope.reason: Every route requires explicit project scope and BUG-73 adds missing handler-level read auth to protocol delta.

G4_sqlite_contention.reason: WAL reader/writer probe completes with zero lock errors; Coord adds readers only.

G5_resource_budget.reason: A conservative 96 MiB Coord projection leaves 592048128 bytes, above the 512 MiB reserve.

G6_tasks_acceptance.reason: Tasks/Auth units and health remain green after ARCH-MS-103 production acceptance.

go_exit.next_action: Build the standalone Coord service and prove side-by-side parity on 8123 in ARCH-MS-105.
